bio => UTF-8 string (763) "I'm Evar Idala Sanglitan Jr., a Bachelor of Science in Computer Science stud...
$value['bio']
I'm Evar Idala Sanglitan Jr., a Bachelor of Science in Computer Science student at Aklan State University - Ibajay Campus and a DOST Junior Level Science Scholarship (JLSS) Scholar. I specialize in full-stack web development with hands-on experience in Laravel, React JS, and Python-based machine learning systems.

My thesis work involves building a self-updating predictive maintenance platform for intelligent water leakage detection — integrating IoT sensors, Random Forest ML models, and a human-in-the-loop retraining framework to solve real-world infrastructure challenges.

I am a Civil Service Professional eligible developer passionate about creating intelligent digital solutions that make a meaningful impact in public service and local communities.
